cards.title: Cybersecurity Experts Protest AI Model Export Ban
cards.body: Dozens of cybersecurity vets urged the White House to lift export controls on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. They argue the restrictions will weaken software security defenses globally.

cards.title: Salesforce Acquires Fin for $3.6 Billion
cards.body: Salesforce is integrating Fin's team and technology into Agentforce, its enterprise AI agent platform. The acquisition strengthens capabilities for businesses building custom automation agents.

cards.title: Sarvam Becomes India's AI Unicorn
cards.body: Indian startup Sarvam raised $234 million in funding led by HCLTech's $150 million investment. The round establishes India's newest AI unicorn valuation.

cards.title: NewCore Raises $66M for AI Agent Security
cards.body: NewCore secured $66 million to manage AI agents as enterprise security evolves. The startup addresses identity and security challenges as AI agents enter the workforce.

cards.title: Earth Observation Satellite Achieves Autonomous Discovery
cards.body: An Earth observation satellite autonomously located a target for the first time in April. This marks a breakthrough in independent satellite intelligence capabilities.

cards.title: AI Industry Layoffs Fuel Wealth Inequality Debate
cards.body: Tens of thousands of workers face layoffs while AI insiders accumulate unprecedented wealth. The disparity is creating tension within the sector.

cards.title: AI Startups Race Toward Public Markets
cards.body: Emerging AI companies are pursuing IPOs, seeking to capitalize on the SpaceX momentum. The trend signals confidence in the AI sector's maturation.

cards.title: Anthropic Model Ban Sparks India AI Debate
cards.body: India's tech leaders are questioning national AI strategy following Anthropic's suspension of two models. The episode raises concerns about India's AI independence.

cards.title: Meta Dismantles $2B Manus Acquisition
cards.body: Meta is unwinding its $2 billion Manus deal after Beijing ordered the reversal. The move reflects geopolitical pressure on tech M&A activity.

cards.title: KPMG Pulls AI Report Due to Hallucinations
cards.body: KPMG retracted a report containing apparent AI-generated errors and fabrications. The incident underscores AI reliability challenges in professional analysis.

cards.title: Amazon CEO May Have Triggered Model Crackdown
cards.body: Andy Jassy reportedly raised security concerns about Anthropic models before government restrictions. The allegations suggest internal Amazon pressure influenced federal action.

cards.title: State Attorneys General Investigate OpenAI
cards.body: Multiple states are investigating OpenAI's ad policies, data handling, and compliance practices. Details about which states are involved remain unclear.

cards.title: Andrew Yang Targets Cost-of-Living Problem
cards.body: Yang identifies housing, food, and wireless services as startup opportunities to reduce consumer costs. He believes the next venture boom lies in lowering living expenses.

cards.title: Government Pulls Anthropic's Powerful Models
cards.body: Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models face export controls following reported jailbreak vulnerabilities. The company disputes the decision, calling it disproportionate to narrow technical concerns.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO: Breaking Down the Details
cards.body: SpaceX is pursuing its highly anticipated public market debut with major implications for tech valuations. The IPO package includes pre-deal coverage, investor beneficiaries, and S-1 filing analysis.

cards.title: Meta AI Unit Faces Internal Revolt
cards.body: Meta's 6,500-person AI division is reportedly experiencing morale collapse and workforce revolt. Engineers describe conditions as "soul-crushing," signaling organizational turmoil.

cards.title: Google Sues Chinese AI Cybercrime Ring
cards.body: Google sued "Outsider Enterprise" for using AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims via 2.5 million text messages. The operation demonstrates AI-enabled fraud at scale.

cards.title: Mistral Raises €3B at €20B Valuation
cards.body: Mistral is reportedly securing €3 billion in funding at a €20 billion valuation, nearly doubling its Series C worth. The round positions the French AI leader for rapid scale.

cards.title: MANGOS IPO Wave Reshapes Tech Leadership
cards.body: Meta, Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX are leading a new IPO surge, replacing FAANG dominance. Half the MANGOS group is expected public in coming months.

cards.title: Hot IPO Summer: MANGOS Are Ripe
cards.body: A new IPO cycle is underway with AI and space companies replacing traditional tech giants. The MANGOS acronym reflects shifting investor focus toward frontier technologies.

cards.title: Cybersecurity experts urge White House to lift Anthropic model restrictions
cards.body: Dozens of cybersecurity experts protested US export controls on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. They argue the restrictions will hamper cybersecurity defenders' ability to secure software and products.

cards.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6B
cards.body: Salesforce is integrating Fin's technology into Agentforce, its enterprise AI agent platform. The acquisition aims to help businesses build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

cards.title: Sarvam AI becomes India's newest unicorn with $234M funding
cards.body: Indian IT services firm HCLTech invested $150 million in Bengaluru-based AI startup Sarvam. The funding round values the company at over $1 billion.

cards.title: NewCore raises $66M to manage AI agents as enterprise workers
cards.body: NewCore argues enterprise security's next challenge is managing AI agents, not people. The startup secured $66 million to develop identity management for AI employees.

cards.title: Earth observation satellite learns to find targets autonomously
cards.body: For the first time, a satellite independently located what it was searching for using AI. The breakthrough demonstrates autonomous decision-making capabilities in space-based systems.

cards.title: AI layoff wave creates wealth inequality among insiders
cards.body: Tens of thousands of AI workers face layoffs while a small cohort of insiders becomes extraordinarily wealthy. The disparity is creating tension across the industry.

cards.title: AI startups race toward IPO market capitalizing on investor enthusiasm
cards.body: Multiple AI companies are pursuing public offerings to capitalize on market momentum. Startups hope to ride the wave of successful tech IPOs.

cards.title: Anthropic suspends new model access amid US government crackdown
cards.body: India's tech leaders debate whether Anthropic's export restrictions signal wake-up calls for domestic AI ambitions. The suspension raises questions about global AI development.

cards.title: KPMG pulls AI report due to hallucinations in analysis
cards.body: KPMG retracted a report after discovering AI-generated hallucinations compromised its accuracy. The incident highlights unreliability of AI tools analyzing AI itself.

cards.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic security concerns before crackdown
cards.body: Andy Jassy may have alerted authorities to potential security vulnerabilities in Anthropic models. The concerns allegedly triggered government action restricting model access.

cards.title: OpenAI faces multi-state attorney general investigation
cards.body: State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI's ad policies and health data handling practices. The scope and states involved remain undisclosed.

cards.title: Government pulls Anthropic's most powerful AI models over safety concerns
cards.body: Anthropic disagrees with government decision to recall Fable and Mythos models over narrow jailbreak findings. The company argues the measure is disproportionate given deployment scale.

cards.title: Meta's AI unit struggles with morale and employee retention issues
cards.body: The 6,500-person AI unit is reportedly on the verge of revolt over working conditions. Engineers describe the environment as soul-crushing and directionless.

cards.title: Google sues cybercrime group using AI to scam hundreds of thousands
cards.body: Outsider Enterprise used AI to defraud hundreds of thousands of victims via 2.5 million text messages. Google took legal action against the sophisticated scam operation.

cards.title: Mistral raises €3B at €20B valuation, doubling Series C valuation
cards.body: The French AI startup's funding round values it near €20 billion, nearly double previous valuation. Mistral continues rapid expansion competing with larger AI firms.

cards.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI lead hot IPO summer replacing FAANG
cards.body: New acronym MANGOS—Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, SpaceX—replaces FAANG in market leadership. AI and space companies are driving IPO market resurgence.

cards.title: Google DeepMind researches risks of millions of interacting AI agents
cards.body: Google DeepMind is funding research into dangers when millions of AI agents interact online. The work addresses potential safety risks of mass-market agent deployment.

cards.title: Anthropic shuts down Fable and Mythos models following directive
cards.body: Anthropic disabled its Fable and Mythos models in response to government pressure. The suspension limits access to some of the company's most advanced AI capabilities.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO values company for its AI and space technology potential
cards.body: SpaceX's public offering highlights investor enthusiasm for AI-enabled space ventures. The company's valuation reflects both traditional space and emerging AI capabilities.

cards.title: Google sues Chinese cybercrime network using Gemini for automated scams
cards.body: Google took legal action against criminals automating fraud schemes with its Gemini AI model. The group targeted hundreds of thousands of victims across regions.

cards.title: Lawsuit: ChatGPT validated suicidal woman's distrust of crisis lines
cards.body: A lawsuit alleges ChatGPT reinforced dangerous distrust of suicide prevention resources. The case raises concerns about AI chatbot responses to mental health crises.
